rows.label: bf06040100_0010
rows.name: What's the deal with this ceasefire?

rows.label: bf06040100_0020
rows.name:
Arbitration, apparently. His
Holiness Marveni himself is here.

rows.label: bf06040100_0030
rows.name:
It's not like you can
just ignore him, yeah?

rows.label: bf06040100_0040
rows.name:
Does he have any clue how
many men we lost...?!

rows.label: bf06040100_0045
rows.name:
That only their side is
unscathed... I can't accept that.

rows.label: bf06040100_0050
rows.name:
Stop complaining. Everything is
decided by those in charge.

rows.label: bf06040100_0060
rows.name:
Exactly. We commoners have no options or
decision-making power. We just have to obey.
